Discord._comment: Create an application at https://discord.com/developers/applications. Add the redirect URI https://your-domain/signin-discord under OAuth2 > Redirects. Prefer setting these via 'dotnet user-secrets' or environment variables (Discord__ClientId / Discord__ClientSecret) instead of committing real values here.

Warden._comment: BootstrapAdminDiscordIds lists Discord user IDs that are automatically granted the built-in Owner role the first time they log in. Use this to get initial access, then manage everyone else through the Roles page.
